title: The Hidden Life of Trees
author: Peter Wohlleben
subline: What they feel, how they communicate.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A side cross-section of tree roots, like an x-ray. Three tree trunks above ground, a complex root network below. One root bridge (the network connecting two trees) is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none" stroke-width="1.5">
    <!-- Ground line -->
    <line x1="-700" y1="-200" x2="700" y2="-200" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- Three trunks above -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round">
      <line x1="-440" y1="-200" x2="-440" y2="-440"/>
      <line x1="-200" y1="-200" x2="-200" y2="-440"/>
      <line x1="200" y1="-200" x2="200" y2="-440"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Crowns as triangles -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
      <path d="M -540 -440 L -440 -580 L -340 -440 Z"/>
      <path d="M -300 -440 L -200 -580 L -100 -440 Z"/>
      <path d="M 100 -440 L 200 -580 L 300 -440 Z"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Roots spreading below -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.6">
      <path d="M -440 -200 Q -480 -100 -540 -20 M -440 -200 Q -400 -80 -360 0 M -440 -200 Q -460 -100 -420 0"/>
      <path d="M -200 -200 Q -240 -100 -300 -20 M -200 -200 Q -160 -80 -120 0 M -200 -200 Q -220 -100 -180 0"/>
      <path d="M 200 -200 Q 240 -100 300 -20 M 200 -200 Q 160 -80 120 0 M 200 -200 Q 220 -100 180 0"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The RED connection: a fungal bridge between two trees' roots -->
    <path d="M -380 -100 Q -260 -20 -160 -100" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
    <circle cx="-380" cy="-100" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <circle cx="-160" cy="-100" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Fungal nodes (dots) along the bridge -->
    <circle cx="-300" cy="-50" r="3" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <circle cx="-260" cy="-30" r="3" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <circle cx="-220" cy="-50" r="3" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Caption -->
    <text x="0" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">THE WOOD WIDE WEB</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A cross-section showing three tree trunks above a horizontal ground line, with three root systems spreading below. Between the leftmost and middle trees' roots, a thick red curve (the mycorrhizal fungal bridge) connects them. That's 'wood wide web' in literal form — the book's secret. Title 300px mixed case splits across two lines. The composition is an x-ray of connection.
